title: Reproduce ONE open dataset end-to-end
context: The cold-start proof: take ONE license-clean open Ewing dataset from acquisition through quantification, QC and provenance on a clean checkout (PLAN §8 M0 exit). Demonstrates the harness works end-to-end before scaling. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Reproduce one open, license-cleared Ewing dataset end-to-end (acquisition → quantification → QC → provenance) with a complete provenance.json and a one-command re-run.
acceptanceCriteria: One open dataset is quantified end-to-end (acquisition → quant → QC → provenance) using only license-cleared inputs.
A complete provenance.json is emitted (input/output checksums, container digests, tool versions, seed).
A one-command re-run is documented and verified by a reviewer on a clean checkout.
Only recipe + accessions are redistributed where the source license forbids redistributing bytes.
output: output/reference-repro/ (quantified matrices + QC + provenance.json for one open dataset).
